commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e3bb7eae11f3177d27192c1422b2329bbd53fa85)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates generated Arabic Control UI locale strings and Arabic translation memory entries for skills, quick settings, chat controls, and cron empty states.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR changes `Skills` locale output while the generator and Arabic glossary still require `Skills -> Skills`. I did not run UI checks because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: This needs contributor-provided real behavior proof plus a maintainer terminology decision for `Skills`, so it is not a safe automated repair candidate.

target.title: fix(ui): improve Arabic Control UI translations
target.body:
## Summary
- Improve Arabic Control UI translations for skills, browser/tool profile labels, chat controls, and cron empty states.
- Keep the Arabic translation memory file in sync with the locale bundle.

## Validation
- `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- `pnpm ui:i18n:check`
- `pnpm ui:build`
- `pnpm lint:ui:no-raw-window-open`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts --reporter=verbose`

Local note: `pnpm test:ui` did not fully complete in this WSL environment because Playwright browser tests need the missing system library `libnspr4.so`; the targeted i18n test passed with the repository Vitest config.
target.author: aim9sour

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
